synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0619 Oracle Linux 9 .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0619
description:
[10.0.102-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.102-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.102 and Runtime 10.0.2
- Resolves: RHEL-138642
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0619

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0619.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-10.0-10.0.2-1.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-10.0-10.0.2-1.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
